response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics perfectly match the song 'フィナーレ。' (Finale.) by eill, covered by Kobo Kanaeru. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was utilized for identifying the correct song lyrics. For the ending talk section, 100% manual transcription was conducted for the Japanese, Indonesian, and English spoken phrases. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitle timings are aggressively matched to actual vocal cord activation to prevent any cascading delays. Quiet sections and instrumental pauses are left silent.

subtitles.original: 例えばハッピー
subtitles.english: For example, rather than a happy...

subtitles.original: エンドより
subtitles.english: ...ending,

subtitles.original: 甘くて豪華なデザートより
subtitles.english: rather than a sweet and luxurious dessert,

subtitles.original: 君がいいんだよ
subtitles.english: I'd rather have you.

subtitles.original: ふたつの傘より
subtitles.english: Rather than two umbrellas,

subtitles.original: 相合傘
subtitles.english: sharing one umbrella.

subtitles.original: ちょっと冷たいけど
subtitles.english: Though it's a bit cold,

subtitles.original: 愛するための代償なら
subtitles.english: if it's the price to pay for love,

subtitles.original: いくらでもどうぞ
subtitles.english: take as much as you'd like.

subtitles.original: ただずっとそばにいたい
subtitles.english: I just want to be by your side forever.

subtitles.original: ねぇダーリン
subtitles.english: Hey darling,

subtitles.original: 星屑もない
subtitles.english: even without stardust,

subtitles.original: ふたりぼっちの世界でずっと
subtitles.english: in our world of just the two of us, forever.

subtitles.original: 最後の花火を上げて
subtitles.english: Let's set off the final fireworks,

subtitles.original: フィナーレを飾って
subtitles.english: decorating the finale.

subtitles.original: 奇跡の降る恋に落ちて
subtitles.english: Falling into a love where miracles fall,

subtitles.original: ダーリンもう離さないで
subtitles.english: Darling, don't ever let go.

subtitles.original: 味気ない世界も悪くないね
subtitles.english: Even a dull world isn't so bad.

subtitles.original: どんなに恋をしたって
subtitles.english: No matter how much I fall in love,

subtitles.original: 出会えないよきっと
subtitles.english: I'll surely never find another like you.

subtitles.original: 終わりのない幸せにキスをしよう
subtitles.english: Let's kiss our endless happiness.

subtitles.original: いつか今日を忘れても
subtitles.english: Even if we forget today someday,

subtitles.original: 君がいいんだよ
subtitles.english: I'd still choose you.

subtitles.original: 全部分け合って初めて通じ合えた
subtitles.english: By sharing everything, we finally understood each other.

subtitles.original: ずっと覚えているよ
subtitles.english: I will remember this forever.

subtitles.original: ねぇダーリン 星屑もない
subtitles.english: Hey darling, even without stardust,

subtitles.original: ふたりぼっちの世界でずっと
subtitles.english: in our world of just the two of us, forever.

subtitles.original: 最後の花火を上げて
subtitles.english: Let's set off the final fireworks,

subtitles.original: フィナーレを誓って
subtitles.english: swearing our finale.

subtitles.original: 奇跡の降る恋に落ちて
subtitles.english: Falling into a love where miracles fall,

subtitles.original: ダーリンもう離さないで
subtitles.english: Darling, don't ever let go.

subtitles.original: 素っ気ない世界も悪くないね
subtitles.english: Even an indifferent world isn't so bad.

subtitles.original: どんなに恋をしたって
subtitles.english: No matter how much I fall in love,

subtitles.original: 忘れられないよきっと
subtitles.english: I will surely never be able to forget you.

subtitles.original: 終わりのない幸せにキスをしよう
subtitles.english: Let's kiss our endless happiness.

subtitles.original: 味気ないね
subtitles.english: It's dull, isn't it?

subtitles.original: でもそれがね
subtitles.english: But that is...

subtitles.original: ふたりの幸せ
subtitles.english: ...our happiness.

subtitles.original: Oh my god, I almost cried. I almost cried singing this song.
subtitles.english: Oh my god, I almost cried. I almost cried singing this song.

subtitles.original: Thank you for today, guys! Thank you for today. Thank you, thank you for watching until the end.
subtitles.english: Thank you for today, guys! Thank you for today. Thank you, thank you for watching until the end.

subtitles.original: And thank you for Zetai's vickice she covered this finale song first, and then I was inspired. So yeah.
subtitles.english: And thank you for Zetai's vickice, she covered this finale song first, and then I was inspired. So yeah.

subtitles.original: Aku balikin ke sini, hehehe.
subtitles.english: I'll return it to here, hehehe.

subtitles.original: イヤ、イヤ。今日は来てくれて、今日は来てくれて、最後まで見てくれてありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah. Thank you so much for coming today, and for watching until the very end!

subtitles.original: I hope you guys enjoy all the performance.
subtitles.english: I hope you guys enjoy all the performances.

subtitles.original: Um, yeah. This whole stream!
subtitles.english: Um, yeah. This whole stream!

subtitles.original: みんな大好き！Thank you for your birthday wishes!
subtitles.english: I love you all! Thank you for your birthday wishes!

subtitles.original: 後で読んであげますね。うん。
subtitles.english: I'll read them later. Yep.

subtitles.original: バイバイ、みんな！No more encore, no more encore. Bye-bye!
subtitles.english: Bye-bye, everyone! No more encore, no more encore. Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: Boko boko boko! Kobo Kanaeru at your service! Let me be your sun to shine your day! Hehehe! Bye-bye!
subtitles.english: Boko boko boko! Kobo Kanaeru at your service! Let me be your sun to shine your day! Hehehe! Bye-bye!
